title: FOLKTIME - 211info
text: FOLKTIME INC OREGON CITY FOLKTIME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers peer run drop-in programs designed for anyone who self-identifies as having lived experience with mental health or substance use challenges. Peer support specialists work alongside peers, empowering them to lead and create environments focused on wellness and recovery. 710 6th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older individuals who identify as having lived experience with mental health and substance use challenges. Potential attendees should be committed to recovery and participation in a positive community and have no recent or ongoing history of violence. Hours: Tuesday 10am-2:30pm Email (971) 888-1784 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 888-1784 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or complete referral form on website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Enter through the back entrance Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Mental Health Issues Mental Health Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
